mapper.select: SELECT c.commentNo, c.content, c.createDate, c.boardNo, c.memberNo, m.memberId, m.memberName FROM boardComment c JOIN member m ON c.memberNo = m.memberNo WHERE c.boardNo = #{boardNo} ORDER BY c.createDate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boardComment (commentNo, content, createDate, boardNo, memberNo) VALUES (boardcomment_seq.nextval, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{boardNo}, #{memberNo})
